name: anchor-web-co-website
description: Anchor Web Co. website - static SPA

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('_site', { recursive: true, force: true })" && npx @11ty/eleventy
scripts.serve: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('_site', { recursive: true, force: true })" && npx @11ty/eleventy --serve

author: Anchor Web Co.
